basic_details.job_title: Karnataka Police Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Cyber Security Analyst, Digital Forensic Analyst Posts
basic_details.post_name: Cyber Security Analyst, Digital Forensic Analyst Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Karnataka Police Department (KSP) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Cyber Security Analyst and Digital Forensic Analyst posts! Published on 18 May 2026 at the official website ksp.karnataka.gov.in, this recruitment drive offers a total of 11 vacancies for eligible candidates.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech/B.C.A/M.Sc/M.C.A in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Electronics & Communication/ Telecommunications and any equivalent or relevant degree with minimum 60% aggregate.
qualification.details: Cyber Security Analyst: B.E/B.Tech/B.C.A/M.Sc/M.C.A in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Electronics & Communication/ Telecommunications and any equivalent or relevant degree with minimum 60% aggregate. Digital Forensic Analyst: B.E/B.Tech/B.C.A/M.Sc/M.C.A in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Electronics & Communication/ Telecommunications and any equivalent or relevant degree with minimum 60% aggregate.

salary_details.pay_scale: Cyber Security Analyst: Rs. 75,000 per month, Digital Forensic Analyst: Rs. 50,000 per month
salary_details.details: Cyber Security Analyst: Rs. 75,000 per month Digital Forensic Analyst: Rs. 50,000 per month

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Karnataka Police Department Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ksp.karnataka.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Karnataka Police Department recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Karnataka Police Department Technical Posts in Cyber Crime Police Stations is 24th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech/B.C.A/M.Sc/M.C.A in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Electronics & Communication/ Telecommunications or an equivalent degree with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between a minimum of 25 years and a maximum of 35 years. Specific age relaxations for reserved categories are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies for the Technical Posts in Cyber Crime Police Stations. These are distributed between the Cyber Security Analyst and Digital Forensic Analyst roles.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is both Email and Offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it either via email or to the specified office address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Cyber Security Analyst post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Cyber Security Analyst position is Rs. 75,000 per month. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Digital Forensic Analyst post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Digital Forensic Analyst position is Rs. 50,000 per month. This is also a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Karnataka Police Department, which is https://ksp.karnataka.gov.in, or from www.bcp.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is COPBCP/EST/EST3(MISC)/70/2023. It is important to mention this number in your application if required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the Cyber Crime Police Stations?
faq.answer: The technical posts are in Cyber Crime Police Stations located in Bengaluru city, Karnataka. The office address for submission is also in Bengaluru.
